prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SILICONEZIPTIES-MULTI24PK-CT23S Product Type: KITCHEN_TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 24pc Reusable Kitchen Food Grade Silicone Zip Ties, Multicolored Description: From cable management and food storage to school supplies and pantry organization, ToolTreaux’s 24 pack of food grade silicone zip ties or twist ties can do it all and will prove handy to have around the house, home office, workplace, or garage for a multitude of tasks. And, the best part? The zip ties are totally reusable.

Home offices, living room media centers, workshops, labs—these spaces, especially if cables are involved, can get messy fast. Whether it’s tripping over an extension cord, or getting your HDMI cable tangled, you need a cable management tool set to clear up space and make your space more organized. ToolTreaux’s environmentally friendly zip ties are the perfect tools for cord organization and cable management. You’ll be amazed at how much room you’ll save by using our twist ties to organize your messy entertainment set or home office. That’s how ToolTreaux’s reusable, multi-color cable ties are creating neater, more efficient rooms, one home, office or workplace at a time.

Now, we did say multipurpose; next stop: food prep and organization. The twist ties, zip ties or straps are made of high-temperature resistant silicone, which means that they are completely safe to use when preparing food in the kitchen (food grade). Even better, the multipurpose cable ties are reusable so you can use them to keep coffee fresh, blanch vegetables or organize your pantry.

Our 24-piece tool set of reusable silicone zip ties will last long in to the future and make your life more convenient and organized. However small or large your organizational project may be, be sure to have a pack of these twist ties on hand and you’ll be well on your way to a neat, tidy, clutter-free and organized space. Search Terms: reusable ties cable zip tool tools extension cord silicone office supplies desk kitchen school pantry organization and storage twist set Features: - REUSABLE MULTIPURPOSE TOOL: From cable management and food storage to school supplies and pantry organization, ToolTreaux’s 24 pack of kitchen grade silicone zip ties or twist ties can do it all and will prove handy to have around the house, home office, workplace or garage for a multitude of tasks; And, they’re reusable! - CORD & CABLE MANAGEMENT: Our bag of assorted silicone twist ties will work on virtually any cable! Whether it be an HDMI cable, basic power cords or an extension cord, these zip ties are made to keep your cables safe and organized, helping you achieve a clutter-free office or workspace - SEAL FOOD BAGS: Another use for our multipurpose silicone ties is to properly seal a variety of bags in your home; Our cable ties ensure you get the most out of your bread, keep pantry items fresh and will even keep your garbage bags sealed, ensuring a neat and tidy, organized kitchen, fridge, freezer, pantry and much more - FOOD PREP: A unique aspect of these silicone twist ties is that the twist ties are food grade approved, meaning you can use our multifunctional zip ties to blanch vegetables or seal food; utilizing these zip straps can help keep food items fresh - HANG ACCESSORIES: These zip ties are notably strong and very durable; because of this, the twist ties can be used to hang a wide variety of items such as lanterns, or attach water bottles to a hiking backpack; a perfect tool to accompany you on family camping trips or trekking adventures === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 24-pk Multicolored Reusable Silicone Zip Ties
